description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist geometric design. The exterior is predominantly white with large rectangular windows, providing ample natural light to the interior. The front features a driveway with a parked car, a tall cypress tree, and a small lawn area. On one side, there is a spacious patio with outdoor dining furniture and a pergola, ideal for gatherings or relaxation. The landscaping includes a mix of tall, slender trees and a broad-leaved tree, enhancing the contemporary aesthetic. The house appears to be constructed primarily from concrete or stucco, with metal and glass elements for windows and doors.
description: A modern, two-story white house with a flat roof, large windows, a driveway, and a landscaped patio with outdoor seating.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, parked car, main entrance, and a tall cypress tree beside the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the patio area with outdoor dining furniture, pergola, and additional landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view with a large tree partially obscuring the patio and a clear view of the flat roof and upper windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, car, and a row of tall cypress trees along the side of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a flat overhang, no steps, and a simple door adjacent to a driveway and landscaped area
